binding.caveat: Grid excluded 99.88% of the loosest variant's trades at its tightest threshold -- binding; the decision below is evidence about the entry-filter hypothesis, not just about this grid's range.

decision.interpretation: No entry-filter threshold produced net PF >= 1.10 on >= 200 trades, on a grid that materially excluded entries at its tightest threshold. This is evidence against the ex-ante entry-filter hypothesis at this grid's range. Stop signal iteration; hand the macro decision back to the user.
decision.multiple_comparison_caveat: Grid has multiple thresholds; a single passing bucket is weak evidence (possible sampling luck). A CONTINUE is only a trigger for a dedicated out-of-sample test, never an approval.
